title: Runeforged Arsenal
body:
![All the items at the time of 1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d14d319e5615cf9b32734925eedd79dbb9f88f5a.png)

Adds mainly combat items that are not just cool, they look good!

The mod uses Lodestone Library ([https://modrinth.com/mod/lodestonelib](https://modrinth.com/mod/lodestonelib)) to achieve fancy effects and looks

- Chronoshift Clock - Charges, then slows enemies in a radius
- Runebound Scythe - On use damages every enemy in a small radius by 4 hearts at a cost of own health
- Runeforged Longsword - Does more damage the less health the target has, ignites the target every 5th hit
- Runic Glaive - On use dashes user forward damaging everyone in the way
- Runic Launcher - Dashes forward (less powerful than Runic Glaive)
